findings.title: CVE-2026-5760 — SGLang LLM Serving Framework RCE via Malicious GGUF Chat Template Injection (CVSS 9.8)
findings.summary: SGLang's reranking endpoint renders unsandboxed Jinja2 chat templates from GGUF model files, allowing attackers who publish malicious models to achieve arbitrary Python code execution on the server with no patch available.

findings.title: MCP STDIO Transport Command Injection — OX Security Identifies Systemic RCE Across Major AI Frameworks (10 CVEs)
findings.affected_technology: Anthropic MCP SDK (Python, TypeScript, Java, Rust), LiteLLM, LangChain, LangFlow, Flowise
findings.summary: OX Security research reveals Anthropic MCP's STDIO transport enables arbitrary OS command injection across all four SDK implementations, with 10 CVEs in downstream AI frameworks affecting 7,000+ servers and 150M+ downloads.

findings.title: Vercel Breach Update — ShinyHunters Claims Data Sale, Unencrypted Environment Variables Confirmed
findings.summary: Vercel breach escalates as ShinyHunters claims data sale with $2M ransom demand, root cause confirmed as compromised Context.ai OAuth app, and CEO acknowledges environment variables were stored unencrypted.

findings.title: CVE-2025-7444 — LoginPress Pro WordPress Authentication Bypass (CVSS 9.8)
findings.summary: Critical authentication bypass in the LoginPress Pro WordPress plugin allows unauthenticated attackers to log in as any existing user including administrators.

findings.title: CVE-2026-0740 — Ninja Forms WordPress Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload (PoC Public)
findings.summary: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in the popular Ninja Forms WordPress plugin with a public PoC exploit gaining traction on GitHub, enabling remote code execution on affected sites.

findings.title: CVE-2026-32135 — NanoMQ MQTT Broker Remote Heap Buffer Overflow (CVSS 8.7)
findings.summary: Off-by-one memory allocation error in NanoMQ's REST API query parameter parsing enables remote unauthenticated heap buffer overflow via crafted HTTP requests.

noted.summary: Sandbox escape via symlink creation allowing writes outside workspace (CVSS 7.7); patched in v2.1.64.
CSS injection in mailbox signature field enables CSRF token exfiltration and agent-to-admin privilege escalation (CVSS 8.1); fixed in v1.8.213.
PHP Object Injection via untrusted input deserialization (CVSS 9.8) potentially leading to RCE; limited deployment of these specific integration plugins.
Unsanitized attachment filenames and image references enable arbitrary file reads/writes outside intended directories (CVSS 6.5); fixed in v7.17.1.
Symlink following during .env file rewriting permits local file overwrite (CVSS 6.6); fixed in v1.2.2, local-only vector.
Forescout discovered 20 new vulnerabilities in serial-to-IP devices used in OT and healthcare; theoretical attack scenarios only, no active exploitation.
Threat actors inject phishing messages into Apple ID name fields to trigger legitimate notifications passing SPF/DKIM/DMARC; social engineering technique, active in the wild.
